name: Easy Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Grease a 13x9-inch pan on the bottom only.
Combine the first three ingredients in a large bowl until well mixed. Press into the prepared pan.
In another large bowl, blend the frosting mix and cream cheese. Reserve half for frosting the baked bars. Add the remaining eggs to the frosting mixture and beat for 3-5 minutes.
Spread over the base. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes. Cool, then frost. Makes about 3 dozen bars.
